messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "page_index": 14,
  "page_range": "14"

message.content: This section contains only the heading "画面与音效表现" (Visual and Audio Performance) with no accompanying text, data, or references. Consequently, it cannot answer specific retrieval questions regarding entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It solely indicates that the broader document addresses visual and audio presentation topics, but detailed queries on this subject must be directed to other sections containing substantive content.
